title: Cultural Delights
description: A Farmer's Delight addon that adds food systems from around the world.
body:
![CD New Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6a323ce1e69b76f2143b3c0e03bd9ce36fc69e1.png)

### A Farmer's Delight addon that adds food systems from around the world.

This mod is still a W.I.P.

Versions below 1.21.1 are for Forge, 1.21.1 is for NeoForge

Versions below 1.19 have been discontinued

Currently working on: Ginger, Beans, Meals, and More!

---

### Current crops implemented: Eggplant, Avocado, Corn, Cucumber
Pickling is only available with the mod Brewin' and Chewin' installed
![Crops](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1051/194/crops.png)
